chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. S-1120 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 7 alongwith reply as at “A” 2. For hearing of CMA No.7277/2025 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 03.11.2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant AG Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, Assistant PG Mr. Raza Mian, DSP (Legal-II) CPO PI Amanullah, PS Korangi Karachi -------------------------------- Petitioner has filed this Constitutional Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973 seeking declaration that the actions of the police officials are illegal, unconstitutional and of no legal effect, however, he seeks protection from this Court. Learned Assistant AG and learned Assistant PG present in Court submit that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioner and every action of the police will be subject to law. However, if there is a cognizable offence, the police shall be free to take action in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of alongwith listed / pending application(s). JUDGE Zahid/*
